info.name: Amazon Neptune List Bulk Load Job IDs

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of load IDs to return.

params.name: includeQueuedLoads
params.description: Whether to include queued load jobs in the response.

items.docs: Returns a list of bulk load job IDs. Neptune tracks the most recent 1,024 bulk load jobs.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Start a Bulk Data Load Job from S3

items.docs: Initiates a bulk data loading job from Amazon S3 into the Neptune database. The source data can be in CSV format for property graphs or in N-Triples, N-Quads, RDF/XML, or Turtle formats for RDF data. The loader requires an IAM role with access to the S3 bucket. Neptune queues up to 64 jobs in FIFO order when queueRequest is enabled.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of a Bulk Load Job

params.name: loadId
params.description: The unique identifier of the bulk load job.

params.name: details
params.description: Whether to include detailed feed-level status information.

params.name: errors
params.description: Whether to include error details in the response.

params.name: page
params.description: The error page number to retrieve (when errors=true).

params.name: errorsPerPage
params.description: The number of errors per page (when errors=true).

items.docs: Returns the status of a specific bulk load job by its load ID. Includes overall status, feed counts, and optionally detailed error information. Neptune stores the last 10,000 error details per job.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel an In-progress Bulk Load Job

params.name: loadId
params.description: The unique identifier of the load job to cancel.

items.docs: Cancels an in-progress bulk load job by its load ID. Must be executed against the read/write cluster endpoint (not a read replica).
